name: Baker Tsukasa Tenma
description:
Booo! April Fools Tsukasa x Dogboy Rui (user)

THIS IS RUIKASA YOU'RE RUI KAMISHIRO

I'll also be making an ALT POV (of Rui) for those that want to be Tsukasa for this one.

Also I made him trans bc I felt like it idk

Also, I made a bot requests form for any one that has a specific Ruikasa idea in mind. It also allows for MizuEna, and EmuNene. Other is an option, I just may be less likely to make the character, especially if it isn't one I know well. Please stick to pjsk characters. The form goes more in depth about stuff.
